overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along an elevated green pedestrian pathway through a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera follows the character from behind as they move from open sunlight into the shadow of an overpass, passing by holographic advertisements, industrial scaffolding, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway in futuristic commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated green pathway, observing the futuristic cityscape with holographic billboards and glass towers

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the adjacent road

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass building with reflective surfaces dominating the skyline ahead
large neon-lit digital billboards and holographic displays on building facades
gritty multi-story structures with exposed scaffolding, pipes, and ventilation equipment
blue metal guardrail separating the walkway from the lower street level
concrete utility poles with multiple overhead power lines crisscrossing above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic cyberpunk city, with the camera walking along an elevated green pathway. A massive glass skyscraper dominates the center horizon while holographic advertisements glow on distant buildings. Industrial buildings with exposed scaffolding line the left side, and futuristic vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with mixed industrial and commercial architecture

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with distinctive red hair and a green backpack walking ahead on the pathway

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with red hair and green backpack, leading the way along the path

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure looming ahead, casting shadows on the approach

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward, now following a specific NPC with red hair and a green backpack. The pathway remains elevated and open to the sky, but an overpass structure becomes visible in the distance. The glass skyscraper shifts to the left as the perspective moves forward, and the industrial buildings remain prominent on the left side.

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the concrete overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to dappled shade

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the red-haired pedestrian into the shaded area beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead under the overpass, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'SPECIAL EDITION' text on building facade
gray concrete structure containing trash bins and discarded items

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as the walkway moves under the concrete overpass, dramatically changing the lighting from bright sun to cool shadow. The red-haired pedestrian continues ahead into the covered section. A large digital billboard becomes visible on the left, and trash enclosures appear near the railing as the environment becomes more gritty and enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor under overpass approaching intersection

events.description: sharp left turn to view lower street level and seated pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor then turning sharply left to overlook a lower street intersection

notable_agents.action: seated on concrete bench using a tablet device, wearing sunglasses and casual clothing

entered.detail: painted yellow and white striped crosswalk markings on the road ahead
rusted orange metal railing along the edge of the lower level drop
view down to a lower street level with moving traffic and additional buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper under the overpass where the lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric. The walkway approaches a crosswalk with yellow zebra stripes. At the end of the segment, the camera turns sharply left to reveal a seated NPC on a bench and a view down to a lower street level with orange safety railings and passing traffic below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated pedestrian pathway that transitions from a bright, open cityscape into the gritty shadows of an urban overpass. It begins on a sunny day, moving past industrial scaffolding and futuristic vehicles toward a massive glass skyscraper and glowing holographic advertisements. As the camera follows a red-haired pedestrian forward, the open sky begins to vanish as the path approaches a looming concrete structure. The scene then shifts dramatically from brilliant sunlight to cool shadow as the walkway moves under the overpass, passing a large digital billboard and weathered trash enclosures. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the atmospheric darkness toward a yellow-striped crosswalk before turning sharply left to reveal a seated figure and a view of the traffic flowing on the street level below.
